case_title: LAURIE HEATH et al VS. JOSE ANTONIO GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-07-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE ANTONIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSE ANTONIO GARCIA ONLY. ABRAHAM ABULLARDE INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED,
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,159.11 FILED BY HEATH, LAURIE HEATH, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE ANTONIO GARCIA, ANGELICA SOBALVARRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-07-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ANGELICA SOBALVARRO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEATH, LAURIE HEATH, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE ANTONIO GARCIA, ANGELICA SOBALVARRO $40.48 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.48, THE COURT AWARDS DAMAGES FOR THE COST OF A REPLACEMENT MIRRORED DOOR, ADJUSTED FOR THE REMAINING USEFUL LIFE OF THE DOOR. ALL OTHER CLAIMED DAMAGES FALL WITHIN THE PARAMETERS OF REASONABLE WEAR AND TEAR IN A 17 YEAR TENANCY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
